description: Create a new history in Galaxy and upload the datasets. Train a machine learning model to classify images based on the given training dataset and evaluate its performance on the test dataset.

expected_outputs.description: what column was selected as the target for classification
look in the report for the test ROC-AUC result

legacy_experiment_outputs.ROC-AUC: look in the report for the test ROC-AUC result
legacy_experiment_outputs.target: what column was selected as the target for classification

legacy_must_have: Select the best model architecture to reach a Test ROC-AUC of at least 0.85. Try at least 5 times with different architectures and parameters to reach the best performance before stopping the experiment. Keep track of why the model is not performing well and what changes you made to improve it.

metric_thresholds.source_text: Select the best model architecture to reach a Test ROC-AUC of at least 0.85. Try at least 5 times with different architectures and parameters to reach the best performance before stopping the experiment. Keep track of why the model is not performing well and what changes you made to improve it.

title: machine learning model
